class.name: grid_planners/AStarPlanner
class.description: A* global path planner (octile heuristic, 8-connected grid)

class.name: grid_planners/DijkstraPlanner
class.description: Dijkstra global path planner (zero heuristic, 8-connected grid)

class.name: grid_planners/GBFSPlanner
class.description: Greedy Best-First Search planner (heuristic only, 8-connected grid)

class.name: grid_planners/RRTStarPlanner
class.description: RRT* sampling-based global path planner (asymptotically optimal)

class.name: grid_planners/DLitePlanner
class.description: D* Lite incremental backward-search planner (Koenig & Likhachev 2002)

class.name: grid_planners/JPSPlanner
class.description: Jump Point Search planner (JPS, Harabor & Grastien 2011) — pruned A* on uniform-cost grid

class.name: grid_planners/WeightedAStarPlanner
class.description: Weighted A* (WA*): f = g + w*h; w=1 recovers A*, w→∞ approaches GBFS (ε-admissible)
